arts.ttl: Rangers transfer 'target' told to turn down Barcelona as Igamane set for Morocco audition at Hampden – Ibrox bulletin
arts.sum: Orlando Pirates wide man Relebohile Mofokeng was linked with a move to Ibrox last summer and has now been told to think hard about what is best for his career

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick speaks out on his two-match ban
arts.sum: But Flick also made a point to ask for the referees to show the same accountability when they are perceived to make mistakes. I don’t want us to complain to the referees.

arts.ttl: Barcelona learn verdict of Hansi Flick red card appeal
arts.sum: Barcelona learn the outcome of their appeal of Hansi Flick's red card against Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Puyol says Cubarsi is ‘more like Pique than me’
arts.sum: Carles Puyol has been talking about Pau Cubarsi and highlighted just how impressed he has been by the Barcelona defender. The former Barca skipper is clearly a big fan of Cubarsi but says he thinks he’s more like Gerard Pique.

arts.ttl: When is Barcelona - Leganés? Times, how to watch on TV and stream online
arts.sum: Leganés suffered a tough loss against Real Sociedad in their last game . Although Los Culés have won five in a row in the Champions League, they have had mixed results of late in the Spanish top flight, tying their latest game 2-2 against Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal have told Barcelona they'd be interested in signing £55m player
